content.verdict: Rosewood Baha Mar is the polished manor-estate inside Nassau's Baha Mar resort destination — 233 rooms plus 30 Beach Villas on Cable Beach, butler service across most categories, and a Sense Spa that consistently lands in best-of-Caribbean lists. You also get reciprocal access across SLS and Grand Hyatt sister hotels, including the casino and 40+ restaurants.
content.best_room: A Beach Villa is the upgrade that matters — three-bedroom optional, but the one-bedroom version delivers a private plunge pool, beachfront patio, and dedicated butler. If suite-tier doesn't fit the budget, request a Manor Ocean View King high in the main tower for the best balcony angle on Cable Beach.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival and Costa dinner
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private transfer from Nassau International (15 minutes), butler check-in at the Manor House lobby. Sunset cocktails at the Library Bar, dinner at Costa by Dario Cecchini — Tuscan-Bahamian grill with pasta from the Antico Vinaio team.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Cable Beach and Sense Spa
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning at the resort's private Cable Beach stretch, butler-arranged loungers and frozen drinks. Afternoon couples Watsu treatment at Sense, then dinner at Commonwealth — Bahamian seafood and Junkanoo-inspired cocktails.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Three pools and casino night
itinerary_7_nights.description: Pool-hop between the adult-leaning Manor pool and the larger main resort pools. Private cabana lunch. Evening at the Baha Mar Casino, then late dinner at Marcus Bar & Grille from Marcus Samuelsson.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Day trip to Exuma swimming pigs
itinerary_7_nights.description: Charter a small plane from Nassau to Staniel Cay for a guided day with the swimming pigs, snorkeling at Thunderball Grotto, lunch at Staniel Cay Yacht Club. Back to Rosewood for a low-key dinner at the Library Bar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Golf or boutique-shopping in Nassau
itinerary_7_nights.description: Optional 18 holes at the Royal Blue Golf Course on property, or a half-day in downtown Nassau — Junkanoo Beach, Bay Street, Graycliff Cigar Company. Dinner at Cleo Mediterraneo at SLS Baha Mar next door.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa morning and beachfront dinner
itinerary_7_nights.description: Couples body scrub plus signature massage at Sense, lunch on the patio at the spa garden. Afternoon at the Beach Villa pool, sunset Champagne on the sand, beachfront dinner-for-two arranged by your butler.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Slow morning and farewell
itinerary_7_nights.description: Late breakfast in suite, final hour at Cable Beach, butler farewell. Lunch at Costa or the pool bar, then short transfer back to Nassau International.

caveats: Rosewood is one of three hotels inside Baha Mar — you'll see SLS and Grand Hyatt guests in the casino, restaurants, and shopping arcade. The Rosewood pool and beach areas stay distinctly calmer.
The Cable Beach water can be cloudier than Eleuthera or Exuma — for picture-perfect blues, plan a day trip out to the Out Islands.
Some restaurants and the casino sit on the Grand Hyatt and SLS sides of the campus — a 5-10 minute walk through the connecting arcade.

faqs.question: How is Rosewood different from the other Baha Mar hotels?
faqs.answer: Rosewood is the smallest, most residential, and most service-led — manor-estate aesthetic, butler service, and a separate adult-leaning pool. SLS is design-forward and party-leaning, Grand Hyatt is the larger family-and-conference hotel.

faqs.question: Do we get full Baha Mar privileges?
faqs.answer: Yes — Rosewood guests can charge across all three hotels, access the casino, and dine at every restaurant on property (40+ outlets total).

faqs.question: Is the beach actually good?
faqs.answer: Cable Beach is a long pretty stretch but the water clarity is good rather than spectacular. Many couples plan a Exuma or Harbour Island day trip mid-week for the iconic Bahamas-blue water.

faqs.question: Is butler service included?
faqs.answer: Yes for Beach Villas and the higher Manor House categories. Standard rooms have a strong concierge team but not a dedicated butler.

faqs.question: Best time to go?
faqs.answer: Mid-November to early December and mid-April to early June. Hurricane risk is meaningful from August through October.

faqs.question: What's the dress code at Costa and Marcus?
faqs.answer: Resort-elegant — collared shirts and nice dresses. No swimwear or flip-flops at dinner. The Library Bar and Beach Bar are more casual.

content.email_template:
Subject: Honeymoon booking inquiry — Rosewood Baha Mar

Hello,

We are planning our honeymoon and would like to enquire about availability for a Beach Villa or Manor Ocean View King for 7 nights.

Could you please confirm:
- Honeymoon package amenities (Champagne, dining credit, spa credit, room upgrade if available)
- Butler service inclusions for the room category
- Sense Spa couples treatment availability
- Costa and Marcus dinner reservation policy
- Airport transfer pricing from Nassau International

Thank you,
content.extra_notes: The Rosewood pool deck operates as a quasi adult-leaning zone in practice — kids gravitate to the main resort pools at Grand Hyatt. Sense Spa runs a couples-package menu that bundles two treatments plus pool access; ask the butler to book it ahead of arrival.
